tEn: Weight Normalization: A Simple Reparameterization to Accelerate Training of Deep Neural Networks
tZh: 权重归一化：一种加速深度神经网络训练的简单重参数化方法
sEn: Weight normalization decouples weight vector length from direction, speeding up SGD convergence without batch dependencies.
sZh: 权重归一化将权重向量的长度与方向解耦，在不引入批次依赖的情况下加速随机梯度下降收敛。
absEn: We present weight normalization: a reparameterization of the weight vectors in a neural network that decouples the length of those weight vectors from their direction. By reparameterizing the weights in this way we improve the conditioning of the optimization problem and we speed up convergence of stochastic gradient descent. Our reparameterization is inspired by batch normalization but does not introduce any dependencies between the examples in a minibatch. This means that our method can also be applied successfully to recurrent models such as LSTMs and to noise-sensitive applications such as deep reinforcement learning or generative models, for which batch normalization is less well suited. Although our method is much simpler, it still provides much of the speed-up of full batch normalization. In addition, the computational overhead of our method is lower, permitting more optimization steps to be taken in the same amount of time. We demonstrate the usefulness of our method on applications in supervised image recognition, generative modelling, and deep reinforcement learning.
absZh: 我们提出权重归一化：一种对神经网络权重向量的重参数化方法，将权重向量的长度与其方向解耦。通过这种重参数化，我们改善了优化问题的条件，并加速了随机梯度下降的收敛。我们的重参数化受批归一化启发，但不会在迷你批次中的样本之间引入任何依赖关系。这意味着我们的方法也可以成功应用于循环模型（如LSTM）以及对噪声敏感的应用（如深度强化学习或生成模型），而批归一化在这些场景中不太适用。尽管我们的方法更简单，但它仍能提供接近完整批归一化的加速效果。此外，我们的方法计算开销更低，允许在相同时间内进行更多优化步骤。我们在监督图像识别、生成建模和深度强化学习等应用中展示了我们方法的实用性。

contrib.en: Proposes weight normalization, a reparameterization decoupling weight vector length from direction to improve optimization conditioning.
contrib.zh: 提出权重归一化，一种将权重向量长度与方向解耦的重参数化方法，以改善优化问题的条件。

contrib.en: Demonstrates faster convergence of stochastic gradient descent with weight normalization across supervised, generative, and reinforcement learning tasks.
contrib.zh: 在监督学习、生成建模和强化学习任务中，展示了权重归一化加速随机梯度下降收敛的效果。

contrib.en: Shows weight normalization works well with recurrent models like LSTMs and noise-sensitive applications where batch normalization fails.
contrib.zh: 表明权重归一化在LSTM等循环模型及批归一化不适用的噪声敏感应用中表现良好。

contrib.en: Introduces mean-only batch normalization combined with weight normalization, achieving state-of-the-art CIFAR-10 test error without data augmentation.
contrib.zh: 引入仅均值批归一化与权重归一化的组合，在不使用数据增强的CIFAR-10上达到最优测试误差。

contrib.en: Provides theoretical analysis showing weight normalization projects gradients away from current weight vector, reducing noise and stabilizing learning.
contrib.zh: 提供理论分析，表明权重归一化将梯度投影到当前权重向量之外，降低噪声并稳定学习。

contrib.en: Offers a computationally cheap and deterministic alternative to batch normalization with lower overhead and no minibatch dependencies.
contrib.zh: 提供一种计算廉价且确定性的批归一化替代方案，开销更低且无小批量依赖。

limits.en: Weight normalization does not fix feature scale across layers, requiring careful data-based initialization for optimal performance.
limits.zh: 权重归一化不固定跨层特征尺度，需要基于数据的初始化以获得最佳性能。

limits.en: The method may not be applicable to models where data-based initialization is infeasible, such as recurrent networks without clear minibatch structure.
limits.zh: 该方法可能不适用于无法进行基于数据初始化的模型，例如缺乏明确小批量结构的循环网络。

limits.en: Empirical results show batch normalization achieves slightly better per-epoch progress early on, though weight normalization compensates with lower computational cost.
limits.zh: 实验结果表明，批归一化在早期每轮进度略优，但权重归一化以更低计算成本弥补。

limits.en: The analysis of gradient projection assumes no momentum or adaptive learning rates, which may not hold for modern optimizers like Adam.
limits.zh: 梯度投影分析假设无动量或自适应学习率，可能不适用于Adam等现代优化器。

limits.en: Mean-only batch normalization combined with weight normalization introduces additional complexity and may not generalize to all architectures.
limits.zh: 仅均值批归一化与权重归一化组合引入额外复杂性，可能不适用于所有架构。

items.en: We present weight normalization: a reparameterization of the weight vectors in a neural network that decouples the length of those weight vectors from their direction. By reparameterizing the weights in this way we improve the conditioning of the optimization problem and we speed up convergence of stochastic gradient descent. Our reparameterization is inspired by batch normalization but does not introduce any dependencies between the examples in a minibatch. This means that our method can also be applied successfully to recurrent models such as LSTMs and to noise-sensitive applications such as deep reinforcement learning or generative models, for which batch normalization is less well suited. Although our method is much simpler, it still provides much of the speed-up of full batch normalization. In addition, the computational overhead of our method is lower, permitting more optimization steps to be taken in the same amount of time. We demonstrate the usefulness of our method on applications in supervised image recognition, generative modelling, and deep reinforcement learning.
items.zh: 我们提出权重归一化：一种对神经网络中权重向量的重新参数化方法，将权重向量的长度与其方向解耦。通过这种方式重新参数化权重，我们改善了优化问题的条件，并加速了随机梯度下降的收敛。我们的重新参数化受批归一化启发，但不会在批处理中的样本之间引入任何依赖关系。这意味着我们的方法也可以成功应用于循环模型（如LSTM）以及对噪声敏感的应用（如深度强化学习或生成模型），而批归一化在这些场景中不太适用。尽管我们的方法更简单，但它仍能提供完整批归一化的大部分加速效果。此外，我们的方法计算开销更低，允许在相同时间内进行更多优化步骤。我们在监督图像识别、生成建模和深度强化学习等应用中展示了我们方法的实用性。

items.en: Recent successes in deep learning have shown that neural networks trained by first-order gradient based optimization are capable of achieving amazing results in diverse domains like computer vision, speech recognition, and language modelling [5]. However, it is also well known that the practical success of first-order gradient based optimization is highly dependent on the curvature of the objective that is optimized. If the condition number of the Hessian matrix of the objective at the optimum is low, the problem is said to exhibit pathological curvature, and first-order gradient descent will have trouble making progress [18, 28]. The amount of curvature, and thus the success of our optimization, is not invariant to reparameterization [1]: there may be multiple equivalent ways of parameterizing the same model, some of which are much easier to optimize than others. Finding good ways of parameterizing neural networks is thus an important problem in deep learning.
items.zh: 深度学习的最新成功表明，通过一阶梯度优化训练的神经网络能够在计算机视觉、语音识别和语言建模等不同领域取得惊人成果[5]。然而，众所周知，一阶梯度优化的实际成功高度依赖于优化目标的曲率。如果目标在最优点的Hessian矩阵的条件数较低，则问题被称为具有病态曲率，一阶梯度下降将难以取得进展[18, 28]。曲率的大小以及优化的成功与否并非对重新参数化不变[1]：可能存在多种等价的参数化同一模型的方式，其中一些比另一些更容易优化。因此，找到良好的神经网络参数化方法是深度学习中的一个重要问题。

items.en: While the architectures of neural networks differ widely across applications, they are typically mostly composed of conceptually simple computational building blocks sometimes called neurons: each such neuron computes a weighted sum over its inputs and adds a bias term, followed by the application of an elementwise nonlinear transformation. Improving the general optimizability of deep networks is a challenging task [4], but since many neural architectures share these basic building blocks, improving these building blocks improves the performance of a very wide range of model architectures and could thus be very useful.
items.zh: 尽管神经网络的架构在不同应用中差异很大，但它们通常主要由概念上简单的计算构建块组成，有时称为神经元：每个这样的神经元对其输入计算加权和并加上偏置项，然后应用逐元素的非线性变换。改进深度网络的整体可优化性是一项具有挑战性的任务[4]，但由于许多神经架构共享这些基本构建块，改进这些构建块将提高非常广泛的模型架构的性能，因此可能非常有用。

items.en: Several authors have recently developed methods to improve the conditioning of the cost gradient for general neural network architectures. One approach is to explicitly left multiply the cost gradient with an approximate inverse of the Fisher information matrix, thereby obtaining an approximately whitened natural gradient. Such an approximate inverse can for example be obtained by using a Kronecker factored approximation to the Fisher matrix and inverting it (KFAC, [19]), by using an approximate Cholesky factorization of the inverse Fisher matrix (FANG, [8]), or by whitening the input of each layer in the neural network (PRONG, [3]).
items.zh: 几位作者最近开发了方法来改善通用神经网络架构的成本梯度的条件数。一种方法是显式地将成本梯度左乘Fisher信息矩阵的近似逆，从而获得近似白化的自然梯度。这种近似逆可以通过使用Kronecker因子分解近似Fisher矩阵并求逆（KFAC，[19]）、使用逆Fisher矩阵的近似Cholesky分解（FANG，[8]）或对神经网络每层的输入进行白化（PRONG，[3]）来获得。

items.en: Alternatively, we can use standard first order gradient descent without preconditioning, but change the parameterization of our model to give gradients that are more like the whitened natural gradients of these methods. For example, Raiko et al. [23] propose to transform the outputs of each neuron to have zero output and zero slope on average. They show that this transformation approximately diagonalizes the Fisher information matrix, thereby whitening the gradient, and that this leads to improved optimization performance. Another approach in this direction is batch normalization [11], a method where the output of each neuron (before application of the nonlinearity) is normalized by the mean and standard deviation of the outputs calculated over the examples in the minibatch. This reduces covariate shift of the neuron outputs and the authors suggest it also brings the Fisher matrix closer to the identity matrix.
items.zh: 或者，我们可以使用标准的一阶梯度下降而不进行预处理，但改变模型的参数化，使得梯度更类似于这些方法的白化自然梯度。例如，Raiko等人[23]提出变换每个神经元的输出，使其平均输出和平均斜率为零。他们表明这种变换近似对角化Fisher信息矩阵，从而白化梯度，并导致优化性能提升。这个方向的另一种方法是批归一化[11]，一种将每个神经元的输出（在应用非线性之前）通过小批量中输出的均值和标准差进行归一化的方法。这减少了神经元输出的协变量偏移，作者认为这也使Fisher矩阵更接近单位矩阵。

items.en: Following this second approach to approximate natural gradient optimization, we propose a simple but general method, called weight normalization, for improving the optimizability of the weights of neural network models. The method is inspired by batch normalization, but it is a deterministic method that does not share batch normalization’s property of adding noise to the gradients. In addition, the overhead imposed by our method is lower: no additional memory is required and the additional computation is negligible. The method show encouraging results on a wide range of deep learning applications.
items.zh: 遵循这种近似自然梯度优化的第二种方法，我们提出了一种简单但通用的方法，称为权重归一化，用于改善神经网络模型权重的可优化性。该方法受批归一化启发，但它是确定性方法，不具有批归一化向梯度添加噪声的特性。此外，我们的方法带来的开销更低：不需要额外内存，额外计算可忽略不计。该方法在广泛的深度学习应用中显示出令人鼓舞的结果。

items.en: We consider standard artificial neural networks where the computation of each neuron consists in taking a weighted sum of input features, followed by an elementwise nonlinearity:
items.zh: 我们考虑标准的人工神经网络，其中每个神经元的计算包括对输入特征进行加权求和，然后进行逐元素非线性变换：

items.en: where 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w} is a k𝑘k-dimensional weight vector, b𝑏b is a scalar bias term, 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x} is a k𝑘k-dimensional vector of input features, ϕ(.)\phi(.) denotes an elementwise nonlinearity such as the rectifier max(.,0)\text{max}(.,0), and y𝑦y denotes the scalar output of the neuron.
items.zh: 其中𝐰是k维权重向量，b是标量偏置项，𝐱是k维输入特征向量，φ(.)表示逐元素非线性变换，如整流器max(.,0)，y表示神经元的标量输出。

items.en: After associating a loss function to one or more neuron outputs, such a neural network is commonly trained by stochastic gradient descent in the parameters 𝐰,b𝐰𝑏\mathbf{w},b of each neuron. In an effort to speed up the convergence of this optimization procedure, we propose to reparameterize each weight vector 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w} in terms of a parameter vector 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} and a scalar parameter g𝑔g and to perform stochastic gradient descent with respect to those parameters instead. We do so by expressing the weight vectors in terms of the new parameters using
items.zh: 在将一个或多个神经元输出与损失函数关联后，这种神经网络通常通过随机梯度下降在每个神经元的参数𝐰,b上进行训练。为了加速这一优化过程的收敛，我们建议将每个权重向量𝐰重新参数化为参数向量𝐯和标量参数g，并直接对这些参数进行随机梯度下降。我们通过使用以下方式将权重向量表示为新参数：

items.en: where 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} is a k𝑘k-dimensional vector, g𝑔g is a scalar, and ‖𝐯‖norm𝐯||\mathbf{v}|| denotes the Euclidean norm of 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v}. This reparameterization has the effect of fixing the Euclidean norm of the weight vector 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w}: we now have ‖𝐰‖=gnorm𝐰𝑔||\mathbf{w}||=g, independent of the parameters 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v}. We therefore call this reparameterizaton weight normalization.
items.zh: 其中𝐯是k维向量，g是标量，||𝐯||表示𝐯的欧几里得范数。这种重新参数化的效果是固定了权重向量𝐰的欧几里得范数：现在我们得到||𝐰||=g，与参数𝐯无关。因此，我们将这种重新参数化称为权重归一化。

items.en: The idea of normalizing the weight vector has been proposed before (e.g. [27]) but earlier work typically still performed optimization in the 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w}-parameterization, only applying the normalization after each step of stochastic gradient descent. This is fundamentally different from our approach: we propose to explicitly reparameterize the model and to perform stochastic gradient descent in the new parameters 𝐯,g𝐯𝑔\mathbf{v},g directly. Doing so improves the conditioning of the gradient and leads to improved convergence of the optimization procedure: By decoupling the norm of the weight vector (g𝑔g) from the direction of the weight vector (𝐯/‖𝐯‖𝐯norm𝐯\mathbf{v}/||\mathbf{v}||), we speed up convergence of our stochastic gradient descent optimization, as we show experimentally in section 5.
items.zh: 归一化权重向量的想法之前已被提出（例如[27]），但早期工作通常仍在𝐰参数化中进行优化，仅在随机梯度下降的每一步之后应用归一化。这与我们的方法根本不同：我们建议显式地重新参数化模型，并直接在新参数𝐯,g上进行随机梯度下降。这样做改善了梯度的条件数，并导致优化过程的收敛性提高：通过将权重向量的范数(g)与权重向量的方向(𝐯/||𝐯||)解耦，我们加速了随机梯度下降优化的收敛，如我们在第5节中实验所示。

items.en: Instead of working with g𝑔g directly, we may also use an exponential parameterization for the scale, i.e. g=es𝑔superscript𝑒𝑠g=e^{s}, where s𝑠s is a log-scale parameter to learn by stochastic gradient descent. Parameterizing the g𝑔g parameter in the log-scale is more intuitive and more easily allows g𝑔g to span a wide range of different magnitudes. Empirically, however, we did not find this to be an advantage. In our experiments, the eventual test-set performance was not significantly better or worse than the results with directly learning g𝑔g in its original parameterization, and optimization was slightly slower.
items.zh: 除了直接使用g，我们也可以对尺度使用指数参数化，即g=e^s，其中s是通过随机梯度下降学习的对数尺度参数。在对数尺度中参数化g更直观，并且更容易让g跨越各种不同数量级。然而，根据经验，我们并未发现这是一个优势。在我们的实验中，最终的测试集性能并不比直接以原始参数化学习g的结果显著更好或更差，且优化稍慢。

items.en: Training a neural network in the new parameterization is done using standard stochastic gradient descent methods. Here we differentiate through (2) to obtain the gradient of a loss function L𝐿L with respect to the new parameters 𝐯,g𝐯𝑔\mathbf{v},g. Doing so gives
items.zh: 在新参数化中训练神经网络使用标准的随机梯度下降方法。这里我们通过公式(2)进行微分，以获得损失函数L关于新参数𝐯,g的梯度。得到：

items.en: where ∇𝐰Lsubscript∇𝐰𝐿\nabla_{\mathbf{w}}L is the gradient with respect to the weights 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w} as used normally.
items.zh: 其中∇_𝐰L是通常使用的关于权重𝐰的梯度。

items.en: Backpropagation using weight normalization thus only requires a minor modification to the usual backpropagation equations, and is easily implemented using standard neural network software. We provide reference implementations for Theano at https://github.com/TimSalimans/weight_norm. Unlike with batch normalization, the expressions above are independent of the minibatch size and thus cause only minimal computational overhead.
items.zh: 因此，使用权重归一化的反向传播只需要对通常的反向传播方程进行微小修改，并且可以轻松使用标准神经网络软件实现。我们在https://github.com/TimSalimans/weight_norm提供了Theano的参考实现。与批归一化不同，上述表达式与批大小无关，因此仅导致极小的计算开销。

items.en: An alternative way to write the gradient is
items.zh: 另一种写梯度的方式是：

items.en: where M𝐰subscript𝑀𝐰M_{\mathbf{w}} is a projection matrix that projects onto the complement of the 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w} vector. This shows that weight normalization accomplishes two things: it scales the weight gradient by g/‖𝐯‖𝑔norm𝐯g/||\mathbf{v}||, and it projects the gradient away from the current weight vector. Both effects help to bring the covariance matrix of the gradient closer to identity and benefit optimization, as we explain below.
items.zh: 其中M_𝐰是一个投影矩阵，将向量投影到𝐰向量的补空间。这表明权重归一化完成了两件事：它将权重梯度缩放g/||𝐯||，并将梯度投影到远离当前权重向量的方向。这两种效果都有助于使梯度的协方差矩阵更接近单位矩阵，并有利于优化，如下所述。

items.en: Due to projecting away from 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w}, the norm of 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} grows monotonically with the number of weight updates when learning a neural network with weight normalization using standard gradient descent without momentum: Let 𝐯′=𝐯+Δ​𝐯superscript𝐯′𝐯Δ𝐯\mathbf{v}^{\prime}=\mathbf{v}+\Delta\mathbf{v} denote our parameter update, with Δ​𝐯∝∇𝐯Lproportional-toΔ𝐯subscript∇𝐯𝐿\Delta\mathbf{v}\propto\nabla_{\mathbf{v}}L (steepest ascent/descent), then Δ​𝐯Δ𝐯\Delta\mathbf{v} is necessarily orthogonal to the current weight vector 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w} since we project away from it when calculating ∇𝐯Lsubscript∇𝐯𝐿\nabla_{\mathbf{v}}L (equation 4). Since 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} is proportional to 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w}, the update is thus also orthogonal to 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} and increases its norm by the Pythagorean theorem. Specifically, if ‖Δ​𝐯‖/‖𝐯‖=cnormΔ𝐯norm𝐯𝑐||\Delta\mathbf{v}||/||\mathbf{v}||=c the new weight vector will have norm ‖𝐯′‖=‖𝐯‖2+c2​‖𝐯‖2=1+c2​‖𝐯‖≥‖𝐯‖normsuperscript𝐯′superscriptnorm𝐯2superscript𝑐2superscriptnorm𝐯21superscript𝑐2norm𝐯norm𝐯||\mathbf{v}^{\prime}||=\sqrt{||\mathbf{v}||^{2}+c^{2}||\mathbf{v}||^{2}}=\sqrt{1+c^{2}}||\mathbf{v}||\geq||\mathbf{v}||. The rate of increase will depend on the the variance of the weight gradient. If our gradients are noisy, c𝑐c will be high and the norm of 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} will quickly increase, which in turn will decrease the scaling factor g/‖𝐯‖𝑔norm𝐯g/||\mathbf{v}||. If the norm of the gradients is small, we get 1+c2≈11superscript𝑐21\sqrt{1+c^{2}}\approx 1, and the norm of 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} will stop increasing. Using this mechanism, the scaled gradient self-stabilizes its norm. This property does not strictly hold for optimizers that use separate learning rates for individual parameters, like Adam [12] which we use in experiments, or when using momentum. However, qualitatively we still find the same effect to hold.
items.zh: 由于投影远离𝐰，当使用无动量的标准梯度下降训练带有权重归一化的神经网络时，𝐯的范数随着权重更新的次数单调增长：设𝐯'=𝐯+Δ𝐯表示我们的参数更新，其中Δ𝐯∝∇_𝐯L（最陡上升/下降），则Δ𝐯必然与当前权重向量𝐯正交，因为我们在计算∇_𝐯L时投影远离它（公式4）。由于𝐯与𝐰成比例，更新因此也与𝐯正交，并根据勾股定理增加其范数。具体来说，如果||Δ𝐯||/||𝐯||=c，则新权重向量的范数为||𝐯'||=√(||𝐯||^2+c^2||𝐯||^2)=√(1+c^2)||𝐯||≥||𝐯||。增长率取决于权重梯度的方差。如果我们的梯度有噪声，c会很高，𝐯的范数会迅速增加，这反过来会降低缩放因子g/||𝐯||。如果梯度的范数很小，我们得到√(1+c^2)≈1，𝐯的范数将停止增长。通过这种机制，缩放后的梯度自稳定其范数。对于使用单独学习率的优化器（如我们在实验中使用的Adam [12]）或使用动量时，这一性质并不严格成立。然而，定性上我们仍然发现相同的效果成立。

items.en: Empirically, we find that the ability to grow the norm ‖𝐯‖norm𝐯||\mathbf{v}|| makes optimization of neural networks with weight normalization very robust to the value of the learning rate: If the learning rate is too large, the norm of the unnormalized weights grows quickly until an appropriate effective learning rate is reached. Once the norm of the weights has grown large with respect to the norm of the updates, the effective learning rate stabilizes. Neural networks with weight normalization therefore work well with a much wider range of learning rates than when using the normal parameterization. It has been observed that neural networks with batch normalization also have this property [11], which can also be explained by this analysis.
items.zh: 根据经验，我们发现增长范数||𝐯||的能力使得带有权重归一化的神经网络优化对学习率的值非常鲁棒：如果学习率过大，未归一化权重的范数会迅速增长，直到达到合适的有效学习率。一旦权重的范数相对于更新的范数变得很大，有效学习率就会稳定。因此，带有权重归一化的神经网络在比正常参数化更广泛的学习率范围内都能良好工作。已经观察到带有批归一化的神经网络也具有这一性质[11]，这也可以通过此分析解释。

items.en: By projecting the gradient away from the weight vector 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w}, we also eliminate the noise in that direction. If the covariance matrix of the gradient with respect to 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w} is given by 𝐂𝐂\mathbf{C}, the covariance matrix of the gradient in 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} is given by 𝐃=(g2/‖𝐯‖2)​M𝐰​𝐂​M𝐰𝐃superscript𝑔2superscriptnorm𝐯2subscript𝑀𝐰𝐂subscript𝑀𝐰\mathbf{D}=(g^{2}/||\mathbf{v}||^{2})M_{\mathbf{w}}\mathbf{C}M_{\mathbf{w}}. Empirically, we find that 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w} is often (close to) a dominant eigenvector of the covariance matrix 𝐂𝐂\mathbf{C}: removing that eigenvector then gives a new covariance matrix 𝐃𝐃\mathbf{D} that is closer to the identity matrix, which may further speed up learning.
items.zh: 通过将梯度投影到远离权重向量𝐰的方向，我们还消除了该方向上的噪声。如果关于𝐰的梯度的协方差矩阵为𝐂，则关于𝐯的梯度的协方差矩阵为𝐃=(g^2/||𝐯||^2) M_𝐰 𝐂 M_𝐰。根据经验，我们发现𝐰通常是协方差矩阵𝐂的（接近）主特征向量：移除该特征向量后，新的协方差矩阵𝐃更接近单位矩阵，这可能进一步加速学习。

items.en: An important source of inspiration for this reparameterization is batch normalization [11], which normalizes the statistics of the pre-activation t𝑡t for each minibatch as
items.zh: 这种重新参数化的一个重要灵感来自批归一化[11]，它对每个小批量的预激活 t 的统计量进行归一化，如下所示

items.en: with μ​[t],σ​[t]𝜇delimited-[]𝑡𝜎delimited-[]𝑡\mu[t],\sigma[t] the mean and standard deviation of the pre-activations t=𝐯⋅𝐱𝑡⋅𝐯𝐱t=\mathbf{v}\cdot\mathbf{x}. For the special case where our network only has a single layer, and the input features 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x} for that layer are whitened (independently distributed with zero mean and unit variance), these statistics are given by μ​[t]=0𝜇delimited-[]𝑡0\mu[t]=0 and σ​[t]=‖𝐯‖𝜎delimited-[]𝑡norm𝐯\sigma[t]=||\mathbf{v}||. In that case, normalizing the pre-activations using batch normalization is equivalent to normalizing the weights using weight normalization.
items.zh: 其中 μ[t], σ[t] 是预激活 t = v·x 的均值和标准差。对于我们的网络只有单层且该层的输入特征 x 被白化（独立分布且均值为零、方差为单位）的特殊情况，这些统计量由 μ[t] = 0 和 σ[t] = ||v|| 给出。在这种情况下，使用批归一化归一化预激活等价于使用权重归一化归一化权重。

items.en: Convolutional neural networks usually have much fewer weights than pre-activations, so normalizing the weights is often much cheaper computationally. In addition, the norm of 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} is non-stochastic, while the minibatch mean μ​[t]𝜇delimited-[]𝑡\mu[t] and variance σ2​[t]superscript𝜎2delimited-[]𝑡\sigma^{2}[t] can in general have high variance for small minibatch size. Weight normalization can thus be viewed as a cheaper and less noisy approximation to batch normalization. Although exact equivalence does not usually hold for deeper architectures, we still find that our weight normalization method provides much of the speed-up of full batch normalization. In addition, its deterministic nature and independence on the minibatch input also means that our method can be applied more easily to models like RNNs and LSTMs, as well as noise-sensitive applications like reinforcement learning.
items.zh: 卷积神经网络通常权重远少于预激活，因此归一化权重通常在计算上更便宜。此外，v 的范数是非随机的，而小批量均值 μ[t] 和方差 σ²[t] 在小批量较小时通常具有高方差。因此，权重归一化可以看作是批归一化的一种更便宜、噪声更小的近似。尽管对于更深的架构通常不精确等价，但我们仍然发现权重归一化方法提供了全批归一化的大部分加速效果。此外，其确定性和对小批量输入的独立性也意味着我们的方法可以更容易地应用于 RNN 和 LSTM 等模型，以及强化学习等对噪声敏感的应用。

full.secZh: 3 数据相关的参数初始化

items.en: Besides a reparameterization effect, batch normalization also has the benefit of fixing the scale of the features generated by each layer of the neural network. This makes the optimization robust against parameter initializations for which these scales vary across layers. Since weight normalization lacks this property, we find it is important to properly initialize our parameters. We propose to sample the elements of 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} from a simple distribution with a fixed scale, which is in our experiments a normal distribution with mean zero and standard deviation 0.05. Before starting training, we then initialize the b𝑏b and g𝑔g parameters to fix the minibatch statistics of all pre-activations in our network, just like in batch normalization, but only for a single minibatch of data and only during initialization. This can be done efficiently by performing an initial feedforward pass through our network for a single minibatch of data 𝐗𝐗\mathbf{X}, using the following computation at each neuron:
items.zh: 除了重新参数化的效果，批归一化还具有固定神经网络每层生成特征尺度的好处。这使得优化对参数初始化具有鲁棒性，因为不同层的尺度可能不同。由于权重归一化缺乏这一特性，我们发现正确初始化参数很重要。我们建议从具有固定尺度的简单分布中采样 v 的元素，在我们的实验中，该分布是均值为零、标准差为 0.05 的正态分布。在开始训练之前，我们初始化 b 和 g 参数以固定网络中所有预激活的小批量统计量，就像批归一化一样，但仅针对单个小批量数据且仅在初始化期间。这可以通过对单个小批量数据 X 执行一次前馈传递来高效完成，在每个神经元处使用以下计算：

items.en: where μ​[t]𝜇delimited-[]𝑡\mu[t] and σ​[t]𝜎delimited-[]𝑡\sigma[t] are the mean and standard deviation of the pre-activation t𝑡t over the examples in the minibatch. We can then initialize the neuron’s biase b𝑏b and scale g𝑔g as
items.zh: 其中 μ[t] 和 σ[t] 是预激活 t 在小批量样本上的均值和标准差。然后我们可以将神经元的偏置 b 和尺度 g 初始化为

items.en: so that y=ϕ​(𝐰⋅𝐱+b)𝑦italic-ϕ⋅𝐰𝐱𝑏y=\phi(\mathbf{w}\cdot\mathbf{x}+b). Like batch normalization, this method ensures that all features initially have zero mean and unit variance before application of the nonlinearity. With our method this only holds for the minibatch we use for initialization, and subsequent minibatches may have slightly different statistics, but experimentally we find this initialization method to work well. The method can also be applied to networks without weight normalization, simply by doing stochastic gradient optimization on the parameters 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w} directly, after initialization in terms of 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} and g𝑔g: this is what we compare to in section 5. Independently from our work, this type of initialization was recently proposed by different authors [20, 14] who found such data-based initialization to work well for use with the standard parameterization in terms of 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w}.
items.zh: 使得 y = φ(w·x + b)。与批归一化一样，该方法确保所有特征在应用非线性之前最初具有零均值和单位方差。使用我们的方法，这仅适用于我们用于初始化的小批量，后续小批量可能具有略有不同的统计量，但实验发现这种初始化方法效果良好。该方法也可以应用于没有权重归一化的网络，只需在根据 v 和 g 初始化后直接对参数 w 进行随机梯度优化：这就是我们在第 5 节中比较的内容。独立于我们的工作，这种类型的初始化最近被不同的作者提出[20, 14]，他们发现这种基于数据的初始化对于使用 w 的标准参数化效果良好。

items.en: The downside of this initialization method is that it can only be applied in similar cases as where batch normalization is applicable. For models with recursion, such as RNNs and LSTMs, we will have to resort to standard initialization methods.
items.zh: 这种初始化方法的缺点是它只能应用于与批归一化类似的情况。对于具有递归的模型，如 RNN 和 LSTM，我们将不得不采用标准初始化方法。

items.en: Weight normalization, as introduced in section 2, makes the scale of neuron activations approximately independent of the parameters 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v}. Unlike with batch normalization, however, the means of the neuron activations still depend on 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v}. We therefore also explore the idea of combining weight normalization with a special version of batch normalization, which we call mean-only batch normalization: With this normalization method, we subtract out the minibatch means like with full batch normalization, but we do not divide by the minibatch standard deviations. That is, we compute neuron activations using
items.zh: 如第 2 节所述，权重归一化使神经元激活的尺度近似独立于参数 v。然而，与批归一化不同，神经元激活的均值仍然依赖于 v。因此，我们还探索了将权重归一化与一种特殊的批归一化（我们称之为仅均值批归一化）相结合的想法：使用这种归一化方法，我们像全批归一化一样减去小批量均值，但不除以小批量标准差。也就是说，我们使用以下公式计算神经元激活：

items.en: where 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w} is the weight vector, parameterized using weight normalization, and μ​[t]𝜇delimited-[]𝑡\mu[t] is the minibatch mean of the pre-activation t𝑡t. During training, we keep a running average of the minibatch mean which we substitute in for μ​[t]𝜇delimited-[]𝑡\mu[t] at test time.
items.zh: 其中 w 是权重向量，使用权重归一化参数化，μ[t] 是预激活 t 的小批量均值。在训练期间，我们保留小批量均值的运行平均值，在测试时将其替换为 μ[t]。

items.en: The gradient of the loss with respect to the pre-activation t𝑡t is calculated as
items.zh: 损失相对于预激活 t 的梯度计算为

items.en: where μ[.]\mu[.] denotes once again the operation of taking the minibatch mean. Mean-only batch normalization thus has the effect of centering the gradients that are backpropagated. This is a comparatively cheap operation, and the computational overhead of mean-only batch normalization is thus lower than for full batch normalization. In addition, this method causes less noise during training, and the noise that is caused is more gentle as the law of large numbers ensures that μ​[t]𝜇delimited-[]𝑡\mu[t] and μ​[∇t~]𝜇delimited-[]subscript∇~𝑡\mu[\nabla_{\tilde{t}}] are approximately normally distributed. Thus, the added noise has much lighter tails than the highly kurtotic noise caused by the minibatch estimate of the variance used in full batch normalization. As we show in section 5.1, this leads to improved accuracy at test time.
items.zh: 其中 μ[·] 再次表示取小批量均值的操作。因此，仅均值批归一化具有居中反向传播梯度的效果。这是一个相对便宜的操作，因此仅均值批归一化的计算开销低于全批归一化。此外，这种方法在训练期间引起的噪声更小，并且由于大数定律确保 μ[t] 和 μ[∇_t̃] 近似正态分布，引起的噪声更温和。因此，添加的噪声尾部比全批归一化中使用的小批量方差估计引起的高峰度噪声要轻得多。正如我们在第 5.1 节中所示，这导致测试时精度提高。

items.en: We experimentally validate the usefulness of our method using four different models for varied applications in supervised image recognition, generative modelling, and deep reinforcement learning.
items.zh: 我们通过四种不同的模型在监督图像识别、生成建模和深度强化学习等不同应用中实验验证了我们方法的有用性。

items.en: To test our reparameterization method for the application of supervised classification, we consider the CIFAR-10 data set of natural images [15]. The model we are using is based on the ConvPool-CNN-C architecture of [26], with some small modifications: we replace the first dropout layer by a layer that adds Gaussian noise, we expand the last hidden layer from 10 units to 192 units, and we use 2×2222\times 2 max-pooling, rather than 3×3333\times 3. The only hyperparameter that we actively optimized (the standard deviation of the Gaussian noise) was chosen to maximize the performance of the network on a holdout set of 10000 examples, using the standard parameterization (no weight normalization or batch normalization). A full description of the resulting architecture is given in table 1 in the supplementary material.
items.zh: 为了测试我们的重新参数化方法在监督分类中的应用，我们考虑了自然图像数据集 CIFAR-10 [15]。我们使用的模型基于 [26] 的 ConvPool-CNN-C 架构，并进行了一些小的修改：我们将第一个 dropout 层替换为添加高斯噪声的层，将最后一个隐藏层从 10 个单元扩展到 192 个单元，并使用 2×2 最大池化而不是 3×3。我们主动优化的唯一超参数（高斯噪声的标准差）是为了最大化网络在 10000 个样本的保留集上的性能，使用标准参数化（无权重归一化或批归一化）。所得架构的完整描述见补充材料中的表 1。

items.en: We train our network for CIFAR-10 using Adam [12] for 200 epochs, with a fixed learning rate and momentum of 0.9 for the first 100 epochs. For the last 100 epochs we set the momentum to 0.5 and linearly decay the learning rate to zero. We use a minibatch size of 100. We evaluate 5 different parameterizations of the network: 1) the standard parameterization, 2) using batch normalization, 3) using weight normalization, 4) using weight normalization combined with mean-only batch normalization, 5) using mean-only batch normalization with the normal parameterization. The network parameters are initialized using the scheme of section 3 such that all four cases have identical parameters starting out. For each case we pick the optimal learning rate in {0.0003,0.001,0.003,0.01}0.00030.0010.0030.01\{0.0003,0.001,0.003,0.01\}. The resulting error curves during training can be found in figure 2: both weight normalization and batch normalization provide a significant speed-up over the standard parameterization. Batch normalization makes slightly more progress per epoch than weight normalization early on, although this is partly offset by the higher computational cost: with our implementation, training with batch normalization was about 16% slower compared to the standard parameterization. In contrast, weight normalization was not noticeably slower. During the later stage of training, weight normalization and batch normalization seem to optimize at about the same speed, with the normal parameterization (with or without mean-only batch normalization) still lagging behind.
items.zh: 我们使用 Adam [12] 在 CIFAR-10 上训练网络 200 个 epoch，前 100 个 epoch 使用固定学习率和动量 0.9。后 100 个 epoch 将动量设置为 0.5，并将学习率线性衰减到零。我们使用小批量大小为 100。我们评估了网络的 5 种不同参数化：1) 标准参数化，2) 使用批归一化，3) 使用权重归一化，4) 使用权重归一化结合仅均值批归一化，5) 使用仅均值批归一化与标准参数化。网络参数使用第 3 节的方案初始化，使得所有四种情况具有相同的初始参数。对于每种情况，我们在 {0.0003, 0.001, 0.003, 0.01} 中选择最佳学习率。训练期间的误差曲线如图 2 所示：权重归一化和批归一化都比标准参数化提供了显著的加速。批归一化在早期每个 epoch 的进展略快于权重归一化，但这部分被较高的计算成本所抵消：在我们的实现中，使用批归一化的训练比标准参数化慢约 16%。相比之下，权重归一化没有明显的速度下降。在训练后期，权重归一化和批归一化似乎以大致相同的速度优化，而标准参数化（无论是否使用仅均值批归一化）仍然落后。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Training error for CIFAR-10 using different network parameterizations. For weight normalization, batch normalization, and mean-only batch normalization we show results using Adam with a learning rate of 0.003. For the normal parameterization we instead use 0.0003 which works best in this case. For the last 100 epochs the learning rate is linearly decayed to zero.
items.capZh: 图 1：使用不同网络参数化的 CIFAR-10 训练误差。对于权重归一化、批归一化和仅均值批归一化，我们展示了使用 Adam 和学习率 0.003 的结果。对于标准参数化，我们使用 0.0003，在这种情况下效果最好。最后 100 个 epoch，学习率线性衰减到零。

items.en: After optimizing the network for 200 epochs using the different parameterizations, we evaluate their performance on the CIFAR-10 test set. The results are summarized in table 2: weight normalization, the normal parameterization, and mean-only batch normalization have similar test accuracy (≈8.5%absentpercent8.5\approx 8.5\% error). Batch normalization does significantly better at 8.05%percent8.058.05\% error. Mean-only batch normalization combined with weight normalization has the best performance at 7.31%percent7.317.31\% test error, and interestingly does much better than mean-only batch normalization combined with the normal parameterization: This suggests that the noise added by batch normalization can be useful for regularizing the network, but that the reparameterization provided by weight normalization or full batch normalization is also needed for optimal results. We hypothesize that the substantial improvement by mean-only B.N. with weight normalization over regular batch normalization is due to the distribution of the noise caused by the normalization method during training: for mean-only batch normalization the minibatch mean has a distribution that is approximately Gaussian, while the noise added by full batch normalization during training has much higher kurtosis. As far as we are aware, the result with mean-only batch normalization combined with weight normalization represents the state-of-the-art for CIFAR-10 among methods that do not use data augmentation.
items.zh: 在使用不同参数化优化网络 200 个 epoch 后，我们在 CIFAR-10 测试集上评估其性能。结果总结在表 2 中：权重归一化、标准参数化和仅均值批归一化具有相似的测试准确率（约 8.5% 误差）。批归一化表现明显更好，误差为 8.05%。仅均值批归一化与权重归一化结合表现最佳，测试误差为 7.31%，有趣的是，它比仅均值批归一化与标准参数化结合要好得多：这表明批归一化添加的噪声有助于正则化网络，但权重归一化或全批归一化提供的重新参数化也是获得最佳结果所必需的。我们假设仅均值批归一化与权重归一化相比常规批归一化的显著改进是由于训练期间归一化方法引起的噪声分布：对于仅均值批归一化，小批量均值近似服从高斯分布，而全批归一化在训练期间添加的噪声具有更高的峰度。据我们所知，仅均值批归一化与权重归一化结合的结果代表了 CIFAR-10 上不使用数据增强的方法中的最先进水平。

items.en: Next, we test the effect of weight normalization applied to deep convolutional variational auto-encoders (CVAEs) [13, 24, 25], trained on the MNIST data set of images of handwritten digits and the CIFAR-10 data set of small natural images.
items.zh: 接下来，我们测试权重归一化应用于深度卷积变分自编码器 (CVAE) [13, 24, 25] 的效果，这些自编码器在手写数字图像数据集 MNIST 和小型自然图像数据集 CIFAR-10 上进行训练。

items.en: Variational auto-encoders are generative models that explain the data vector 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x} as arising from a set of latent variables 𝐳𝐳\mathbf{z}, through a joint distribution of the form p​(𝐳,𝐱)=p​(𝐳)​p​(𝐱|𝐳)𝑝𝐳𝐱𝑝𝐳𝑝conditional𝐱𝐳p(\mathbf{z},\mathbf{x})=p(\mathbf{z})p(\mathbf{x}|\mathbf{z}), where the decoder p​(𝐱|𝐳)𝑝conditional𝐱𝐳p(\mathbf{x}|\mathbf{z}) is specified using a neural network. A lower bound on the log marginal likelihood log⁡p​(𝐱)𝑝𝐱\log p(\mathbf{x}) can be obtained by approximately inferring the latent variables 𝐳𝐳\mathbf{z} from the observed data 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x} using an encoder distribution q​(𝐳|𝐱)𝑞conditional𝐳𝐱q(\mathbf{z}|\mathbf{x}) that is also specified as a neural network. This lower bound is then optimized to fit the model to the data.
items.zh: 变分自编码器是生成模型，将数据向量 x 解释为来自一组潜在变量 z，通过联合分布 p(z, x) = p(z)p(x|z) 的形式，其中解码器 p(x|z) 使用神经网络指定。通过对数边际似然 log p(x) 的下界可以通过使用编码器分布 q(z|x)（也指定为神经网络）从观测数据 x 近似推断潜在变量 z 来获得。然后优化这个下界以将模型拟合到数据。

items.en: We follow a similar implementation of the CVAE as in [25] with some modifications, mainly that the encoder and decoder are parameterized with ResNet [9] blocks, and that the diagonal posterior is replaced with auto-regressive variational inference111Manuscript in preparation. For MNIST, the encoder consists of 3 sequences of two ResNet blocks each, the first sequence acting on 16 feature maps, the others on 32 feature maps. The first two sequences are followed by a 2-times subsampling operation implemented using 2×2222\times 2 stride, while the third sequence is followed by a fully connected layer with 450 units. The decoder has a similar architecture, but with reversed direction. For CIFAR-10, we used a neural architecture with ResNet units and multiple intermediate stochastic layers1. We used Adamax [12] with α=0.002𝛼0.002\alpha=0.002 for optimization, in combination with Polyak averaging [22] in the form of an exponential moving average that averages parameters over approximately 10 epochs.
items.zh: 我们遵循与 [25] 类似的 CVAE 实现，并进行了一些修改，主要是编码器和解码器使用 ResNet [9] 块参数化，并且对角线后验被自回归变分推理替代¹。对于 MNIST，编码器由三个序列组成，每个序列包含两个 ResNet 块，第一个序列作用于 16 个特征图，其他序列作用于 32 个特征图。前两个序列之后是使用 2×2 步长实现的 2 倍下采样操作，而第三个序列之后是一个具有 450 个单元的全连接层。解码器具有类似的架构，但方向相反。对于 CIFAR-10，我们使用了具有 ResNet 单元和多个中间随机层的神经架构¹。我们使用 Adamax [12] 和 α=0.002 进行优化，并结合 Polyak 平均 [22]，形式为指数移动平均，大约在 10 个 epoch 内平均参数。

items.en: In figure 3, we plot the test-set lower bound as a function of number of training epochs, including error bars based on multiple different random seeds for initializing parameters. As can be seen, the parameterization with weight normalization has lower variance and converges to a better optimum. We observe similar results across different hyper-parameter settings.
items.zh: 在图 3 中，我们绘制了测试集下界随训练 epoch 数量的变化，包括基于多个不同随机种子初始化参数得到的误差条。可以看出，使用权重归一化的参数化具有更低的方差并收敛到更好的最优值。我们在不同的超参数设置下观察到类似的结果。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Marginal log likelihood lower bound on the MNIST (top) and CIFAR-10 (bottom) test sets for a convolutional VAE during training, for both the standard implementation as well as our modification with weight normalization. For MNIST, we provide standard error bars to indicate variance based on different initial random seeds.
items.capZh: 图3：在MNIST（上）和CIFAR-10（下）测试集上，卷积VAE训练过程中的边际对数似然下界，分别对应标准实现和我们的权重归一化修改。对于MNIST，我们提供了标准误差条以指示基于不同初始随机种子的方差。

items.en: Next, we consider DRAW, a recurrent generative model by [7]. DRAW is a variational auto-encoder with generative model p​(𝐳)​p​(𝐱|𝐳)𝑝𝐳𝑝conditional𝐱𝐳p(\mathbf{z})p(\mathbf{x}|\mathbf{z}) and encoder q​(𝐳|𝐱)𝑞conditional𝐳𝐱q(\mathbf{z}|\mathbf{x}), similar to the model in section 5.2, but with both the encoder and decoder consisting of a recurrent neural network comprised of Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) [10] units. LSTM units consist of a memory cell with additive dynamics, combined with input, forget, and output gates that determine which information flows in and out of the memory. The additive dynamics enables learning of long-range dependencies in the data.
items.zh: 接下来，我们考虑DRAW，一种由[7]提出的循环生成模型。DRAW是一种变分自编码器，其生成模型为p(𝐳)p(𝐱|𝐳)，编码器为q(𝐳|𝐱)，与第5.2节中的模型类似，但编码器和解码器均由长短期记忆（LSTM）[10]单元组成的循环神经网络构成。LSTM单元包含一个具有加性动力学的记忆单元，并结合输入门、遗忘门和输出门，以决定哪些信息流入和流出记忆。加性动力学使得模型能够学习数据中的长程依赖关系。

items.en: At each time step of the model, DRAW uses the same set of weight vectors to update the cell states of the LSTM units in its encoder and decoder. Because of the recurrent nature of this process it is not clear how batch normalization could be applied to this model: Normalizing the cell states diminishes their ability to pass through information. Fortunately, weight normalization can be applied trivially to the weight vectors of each LSTM unit, and we find this to work well empirically.
items.zh: 在模型的每个时间步，DRAW使用相同的权重向量集来更新其编码器和解码器中LSTM单元的细胞状态。由于这一过程的循环性质，尚不清楚如何将批归一化应用于该模型：归一化细胞状态会削弱其传递信息的能力。幸运的是，权重归一化可以轻松应用于每个LSTM单元的权重向量，并且我们发现这在经验上效果良好。

items.en: We take the Theano implementation of DRAW provided at https://github.com/jbornschein/draw and use it to model the MNIST data set of handwritten digits. We then make a single modification to the model: we apply weight normalization to all weight vectors. As can be seen in figure 4, this significantly speeds up convergence of the optimization procedure, even without modifying the initialization method and learning rate that were tuned for use with the normal parameterization.
items.zh: 我们采用https://github.com/jbornschein/draw提供的DRAW的Theano实现，用于对手写数字MNIST数据集进行建模。然后我们对模型进行单一修改：对所有权重向量应用权重归一化。如图4所示，即使不修改为正常参数化调优的初始化方法和学习率，这也能显著加速优化过程的收敛。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Marginal log likelihood lower bound on the MNIST test set for DRAW during training, for both the standard implementation as well as our modification with weight normalization. 100 epochs is not sufficient for convergence for this model, but the implementation using weight normalization clearly makes progress much more quickly than with the standard parameterization.
items.capZh: 图4：DRAW在MNIST测试集上训练过程中的边际对数似然下界，分别对应标准实现和我们的权重归一化修改。对于该模型，100个epoch不足以收敛，但使用权重归一化的实现明显比标准参数化进展更快。

items.en: Next we apply weight normalization to the problem of Reinforcement Learning for playing games on the Atari Learning Environment [2]. The approach we use is the Deep Q-Network (DQN) proposed by [21]. This is an application for which batch normalization is not well suited: the noise introduced by estimating the minibatch statistics destabilizes the learning process. We were not able to get batch normalization to work for DQN without using an impractically large minibatch size. In contrast, weight normalization is easy to apply in this context, as is the initialization method of section 3. Stochastic gradient learning is performed using Adamax [12] with momentum of 0.5. We search for optimal learning rates in {0.0001,0.0003,0.001,0.003}0.00010.00030.0010.003\{0.0001,0.0003,0.001,0.003\}, generally finding 0.00030.00030.0003 to work well with weight normalization and 0.00010.00010.0001 to work well for the normal parameterization. We also use a larger minibatch size (64) which we found to be more efficient on our hardware (Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud g2.2xlarge GPU instance). Apart from these changes we follow [21] as closely as possible in terms of parameter settings and evaluation methods. However, we use a Python/Theano/Lasagne reimplementation of their work, adapted from the implementation available at https://github.com/spragunr/deep_q_rl, so there may be small additional differences in implementation.
items.zh: 接下来，我们将权重归一化应用于Atari学习环境[2]中玩游戏的强化学习问题。我们采用的方法是由[21]提出的深度Q网络（DQN）。这是一个批归一化不适用的应用场景：估计小批量统计量引入的噪声会破坏学习过程的稳定性。我们无法在不使用不切实际的大批量大小的情况下使批归一化在DQN中工作。相比之下，权重归一化在此上下文中易于应用，第3节的初始化方法也是如此。随机梯度学习使用Adamax [12]进行，动量为0.5。我们在{0.0001, 0.0003, 0.001, 0.003}中搜索最优学习率，通常发现0.0003对权重归一化效果良好，0.0001对正常参数化效果良好。我们还使用了更大的批量大小（64），发现在我们的硬件（Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud g2.2xlarge GPU实例）上更高效。除了这些变化，我们在参数设置和评估方法上尽可能遵循[21]。然而，我们使用了他们工作的Python/Theano/Lasagne重新实现，改编自https://github.com/spragunr/deep_q_rl的实现，因此实现上可能存在微小差异。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Evaluation scores for Space Invaders obtained by DQN after each epoch of training, for both the standard parameterization and using weight normalization. Learning rates for both cases were selected to maximize the highest achieved test score.
items.capZh: 图5：DQN在每轮训练后获得的Space Invaders评估分数，分别对应标准参数化和使用权重归一化。两种情况下选择学习率以最大化最高测试分数。

items.en: We have presented weight normalization, a simple reparameterization of the weight vectors in a neural network that accelerates the convergence of stochastic gradient descent optimization. Weight normalization was applied to four different models in supervised image recognition, generative modelling, and deep reinforcement learning, showing a consistent advantage across applications. The reparameterization method is easy to apply, has low computational overhead, and does not introduce dependencies between the examples in a minibatch, making it our default choice in the development of new deep learning architectures.
items.zh: 我们提出了权重归一化，一种对神经网络中权重向量的简单重参数化方法，可加速随机梯度下降优化的收敛。权重归一化已应用于监督图像识别、生成建模和深度强化学习中的四种不同模型，显示出跨应用的一致优势。该重参数化方法易于应用，计算开销低，且不引入小批量中样本之间的依赖关系，使其成为我们开发新深度学习架构时的默认选择。

items.en: We thank John Schulman for helpful comments on an earlier draft of this paper.
items.zh: 我们感谢John Schulman对本文早期草稿的有益评论。
